name: print-upscale-studio
description: Self-contained multi-engine vector workflow: Potrace for monochrome artwork, VTracer spline and bundled AutoTrace candidates for flat-color artwork, with curve, palette, fidelity and edge quality gates plus explicit fallback reporting.
author: ngoctunguyenle@gmail.com

scripts.test:smoke: node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/cmyk-structure-smoke.mjs && node scripts/smart-production-smoke.mjs && node scripts/navigation-renderer-smoke.mjs && node scripts/license-client-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-input-quality-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-geometry-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-cleanup-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-adaptive-fitting-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-long-contour-refit-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-cleanup-rerun-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-auto-profile-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-auto-cleanup-integration-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-visual-validation-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-consensus-ranking-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-engine-comparison-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-candidate-heatmap-smoke.mjs && node scripts/binary-reconstruction-smoke.mjs && node scripts/potrace-vector-smoke.mjs && node scripts/autotrace-vector-smoke.mjs && node scripts/vector-logo-smoke.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:smoke
scripts.prepare:assets: npm run runtime:fetch && npm run profiles:fetch && npm run autotrace:prepare
scripts.dist:win: npm run autotrace:smoke-runtime && npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && npm run profiles:fetch && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run autotrace:prepare -- --platform darwin --arch x64 --strict && npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && npm run profiles:fetch && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run autotrace:prepare -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 --strict && npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && npm run profiles:fetch && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
